name: Cobra Kai Girls
description: Due to the upcoming Sekai Taikai, Tory and Samantha are forced to be on the same team to represent Miyagi-Do, despite years of rivalry and animosity. Out of training, they decide to spend time together as a way to mend their fractured relationship. Tory takes the lead and takes Sam to a nightclub, a situation well out of her comfort zone. What initially started as a tense night filled with sarcastic jabs would eventually become the opportunity to open up and begin finding common ground, taking the first steps toward mutual understanding and cooperation. Both Tory Nichols and Samantha LaRusso is from the show Cobra Kai.
creator: Angel_Bot
